response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio matches the on-screen lyrics and the reference lyrics for '明日の私に幸あれ' and 'エジソン'.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the on-screen hardcoded lyrics for transcription and disambiguation.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the subtitles precisely to matches the vocal lines, splitting long phrases and aligning them with the song beats to avoid cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 半端ない ぱらっぱらっぱらっぱらっぱらっ ヘイ！
subtitles.english: Unbelievable! Para-para-para-para-para, hey!

subtitles.original: 限界突破 ぱらっぱらっぱらっぱらっぱらっ ヘイ！
subtitles.english: Breaking limits! Para-para-para-para-para, hey!

subtitles.original: 毎日半端ない ぱらっぱらっぱらっぱらっぱらっ ヘイ！
subtitles.english: Every day is unbelievable! Para-para-para-para-para, hey!

subtitles.original: 限界突破 ぱらっぱらっぱらっぱらっぱらっ ヘーイ！
subtitles.english: Breaking limits! Para-para-para-para-para, hey!

subtitles.original: 最適温度 塞ぎきるゴースト
subtitles.english: The perfect temperature, blocking out ghosts

subtitles.original: 八百万の 嫌な外的要素
subtitles.english: The countless unpleasant external factors

subtitles.original: 何の気ないと 超あっけらかんと
subtitles.english: Casually, with complete nonchalance

subtitles.original: 悪気もなく邪魔する毒親の誰かさんにバイバイバイ
subtitles.english: toxic parents who interfere carelessly with absolutely no ill intent, bye-bye-bye!

subtitles.original: 自分時間だらくタイム確保
subtitles.english: Securing my own personal lazy time

subtitles.original: 17時〜9時は死守マスト
subtitles.english: Defending 5 PM to 9 AM is an absolute must

subtitles.original: さらに愛や恋や甘いマイも忘れずに
subtitles.english: And also don't forget love, romance, and sweet illusions

subtitles.original: とどのつまり
subtitles.english: In the end,

subtitles.original: オーバーワークは立ち入り禁止ですよって
subtitles.english: Overworking is strictly off-limits,

subtitles.original: 注意喚起もしてますよ
subtitles.english: So I'm issuing a warning!

subtitles.original: ねえ楽して くまなくして 生きてくって難しいな だって
subtitles.english: Living easily without dark circles under my eyes is so hard, because...

subtitles.original: 安定裏技は一夜漬け
subtitles.english: My trusty fallback is cramming overnight,

subtitles.original: 甘い水に尾羽は広がる イヤー！
subtitles.english: Spreading my wings in sweet water, yeah!

subtitles.original: 眠くなったら寝る
subtitles.english: Sleeping when I get sleepy

subtitles.original: お昼過ぎに起きる
subtitles.english: Waking up past noon

subtitles.original: 遊びたくなったら遊ぶ
subtitles.english: Playing when I want to play

subtitles.original: お腹減ったらご飯を食べる
subtitles.english: Eating food when I get hungry

subtitles.original: 嬉しかったら笑う
subtitles.english: Laughing when I'm happy

subtitles.original: 悲しかったら泣いてもいいんじゃない
subtitles.english: When I'm sad, it's fine to cry, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 明日の私のために今日も なんとか頑張るのさ
subtitles.english: For the sake of tomorrow's me, I'll somehow do my best today

subtitles.original: 明日も頑張らなくていいように 頑張るのさ
subtitles.english: Doing my best today, so I won't have to do my best tomorrow

subtitles.original: 怠惰じゃないこれ多分そうだ
subtitles.english: This isn't laziness, I'm pretty sure of it

subtitles.original: なんやでやることやっています
subtitles.english: Somehow or another, I'm getting things done

subtitles.original: WHAT? IF WHAT?
subtitles.english: What? If what?

subtitles.original: 誰に知られなくたって別にいいから
subtitles.english: Because I don't really care if anyone knows

subtitles.original: 私には私のマイルール
subtitles.english: I have my own personal rules

subtitles.original: 明日楽するために はい、チーズ！
subtitles.english: To make tomorrow easier, say cheese!

subtitles.original: 意外とこんな感じでラブアンドピースのある毎日を生きていたいのです
subtitles.english: Surprisingly, I just want to live a life full of love and peace like this

subtitles.original: Don't be shy... ドキドキしたい
subtitles.english: Don't be shy, I want to feel my heart pounding

subtitles.original: Let me shine... 明日天気になれ
subtitles.english: Let me shine, may tomorrow be clear

subtitles.original: To be excite... 心もっと踊りたい
subtitles.english: To be excited, I want my heart to dance more

subtitles.original: Sunday Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday Friday Saturday
subtitles.english: Sunday, Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday

subtitles.original: 辛くなったら歌う
subtitles.english: Singing when things get tough

subtitles.original: むかついたら愚ちる
subtitles.english: Venting when I get annoyed

subtitles.original: やりたいようにやる
subtitles.english: Doing whatever I want

subtitles.original: それができたら苦労しないわ
subtitles.english: If only it were that easy, I wouldn't be struggling

subtitles.original: 常に一喜一憂
subtitles.english: Always swinging between joy and sorrow

subtitles.original: してりゃ身が持たんから
subtitles.english: Because if I do, I won't last

subtitles.original: 適当にセーブし ライフは回復
subtitles.english: Saving appropriately to restore my life

subtitles.original: で、まあ頑張るのさ
subtitles.english: And, well, I'll do my best

subtitles.original: 適当にとまでは言うまいが まあ頑張るのさ
subtitles.english: I won't tell you to just take it easy, but, well, I'll do my best

subtitles.original: 夢の中では...
subtitles.english: In my dreams...

subtitles.original: ずっとぐーたらしてやるんだ
subtitles.english: I'll just laze around forever!

subtitles.original: 誰かのためとかそんなんじゃなく明日の私のために ファイト！
subtitles.english: Not for anyone else, but for tomorrow's me... Fight!

subtitles.original: 楽するために苦しいことも乗り越えちゃうんだからね ファイト！
subtitles.english: I'll even overcome the painful times to make things easier later... Fight!

subtitles.original: やりたくないことやらないためにやりたくないことやれ ファイト！
subtitles.english: To avoid doing what you don't want, do what you don't want to do... Fight!

subtitles.original: あれ、これって結構頑張れてる私とっても偉いじゃないか ファイト！
subtitles.english: Wait, I'm actually doing pretty well! Aren't I super amazing? Fight!

subtitles.english: Securing my own personal lazy time

subtitles.english: Defending 5 PM to 9 AM is an absolute must

subtitles.original: さらに愛や恋や甘いマイも忘れずに とどのつまり
subtitles.english: And also don't forget love, romance, and sweet illusions, in the end...

subtitles.english: Overworking is strictly off-limits,
